forager.model.object

Class Harvestable

  • java.lang.Object
    • forager.model.FixedObject
      • forager.model.object.Harvestable
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    QuadTreeElement
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    MultiRessource, Ressource

    public abstract class Harvestable
extends FixedObject
    An harvestable fixed object.
    Author:
    Guillaume Desquesnes

    • Constructor Detail

      • Harvestable

        public Harvestable(Environnement env,
           Rectangle hitbox,
           int quantity)
        Create a new harvestable fixed object.
        Parameters:
        env - The environnement where this belongs.
        hitbox - This hitbox.
        quantity - This quantity.

    • Method Detail

      • harvest

        public abstract int harvest(AgentEntity entity,
          String type)
        Harvest the entity by an agent.
        Parameters:
        entity - The harvester.
        type - The type of ressource to harvest.
        Returns:
        The quantity harvested.

      • harvestable

        public boolean harvestable()
        Description copied from class: FixedObject
        Test if the object is harvestable.
        Overrides:
        harvestable in class FixedObject
        Returns:
        True if you can harvest this object, else false.

      • hasType

        public abstract boolean hasType(String type)
        Test if the harvestable contain the given type.
        Parameters:
        type - The ressource type.
        Returns:
        True if this contain that ressource, else false.

      • quantity

        public int quantity()
        Get the quantity of the object.
        Returns:
        The quantity of the object.
